sanskrit:
लेलिह्यसे ग्रसमानः समन्ताल्लोकान्समग्रान्वदनैर्ज्वलद्भिः।
तेजोभिरापूर्य जगत्समग्रं भासस्तवोग्राः प्रतपन्ति विष्णो॥
transliteration:
lelihyase grasamānaḥ samantāl lokān samagrān vadanair jvaladbhiḥ |
tejobhir āpūrya jagat samagraṃ bhāsas tavogrāḥ pratapanti viṣṇo ||
literal_meaning: You are licking / devouring / from every side / all worlds / completely / with mouths / blazing / with splendors / filling / the universe / entirely / rays / Your / terrible / are scorching / O all-pervading Lord.
contextual_meaning: Arjuna confronts the archetype of total annihilation: every structure of meaning, identity, and safety is being swallowed by a luminous, all-consuming force. The ego’s narrative is literally being eaten alive, revealing the psyche’s terror before the transpersonal power of transformation.

shadow: Secret wish to be devoured (fusion fantasy)

psychological_state: Acute dissociative awe bordering on panic; the self-structure is temporarily shattered by an encounter with the Self/Destroyer archetype, producing both existential dread and a paradoxical relief from egoic responsibility.
trigger_scenario: Standing in the ICU watching a loved one on life-support while monitors flash and alarms sound—realizing every system could fail at once and there is nothing you can do to stop the inevitable.
anchor_text: Let every certainty burn away; only the deathless Self remains.
